description: Add a backend for YubiKey beyond PKCS#11/PIV. OATH (TOTP/HOTP) and OpenPGP are separate protocols with their own APIs. Candidate crates: yubikey (RustCrypto). Scope: SigningBackend for OpenPGP signing, possibly SecretStore for OATH secrets.
title: Add secretx-yubikey backend (YubiKey OATH/OpenPGP)
